title: Deselect
description: Press a button to empty your hand without messing with your hotbar!
body:
# Deselect

## How does it work?
Have you ever wished that you could press a button to have an empty hand without removing anything from your hotbar?
Ever thought it felt weird to be carrying some kind of item in your hands while you go to bed and walked around your base,
and wished you could keep your hands empty without having to constantly shuffle around your hotbar?
Well now you can!

Inspired by the same mechanic which is present in Starbound, all you need to do is press the **Z** key, and your hand will
be empty!

## Technically Useful™
Allows for interaction with mechanics requiring an empty hand without the need to mess up your beautiful hotbar layout!

## Found a bug?
The way this mod works internally is kinda jank, so there's a decent chance you find a couple bugs. If you do, please report
it over at the [Codeberg repository](https://codeberg.org/jolkert/deselect/issues/) or ask about it in the `help-forum` channel in 
my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/G3pqGwydVd)

## Will you support [insert version here]?
Once 26.1 releases, I plan to begin supporting latest version while maintaining 1.21.1 support for as long as it remains
a predominant version for modpacks

That's it. That's the mod
